title: There is sunshine in my soul today
firstLine: There is sunshine in my soul today,
publicDomainBasis: Eliza Edmunds Hewitt (1851–1920), John Robson Sweney (1837–1899). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
There is sunshine in my soul today,
More glorious and bright
Than glows in any earthly sky,
For Jesus is my light.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
There is music in my soul today,
A carol to my King;
And Jesus, listening, can hear
The song I cannot sing.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
There is springtime in my soul today,
For when the Lord is near
The dove of peace sings in my heart,
The flowers of grace appear.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
There is gladness in my soul today,
And hope, and praise, and love,
For blessings which He gives me now,
For joys laid up above.
